overall.description: First-person perspective walking down a dimly lit industrial corridor in a cyberpunk-style video game. The camera steadily approaches a brightly lit burrito vending machine with neon signage while passing concrete walls with graffiti and metal security gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with neon vending machine

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow corridor toward the illuminated vending machine at the end

entered.detail: gray concrete wall with faded graffiti and scuff marks running along the left side
closed metal roll-up security gate with diamond pattern mesh on the right wall
single circular overhead light fixture casting a warm yellow pool of illumination
tall vending machine with bright neon signage displaying BURRITO and IT'S BIG in colorful lights
window on left wall showing dark exterior with purple neon glow from outside
wall-mounted panel with glowing green circular light near the vending machine

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow industrial corridor with concrete walls and a metal security gate on the right. A brightly lit burrito vending machine with neon signage serves as the focal point at the end of the hall, growing larger as the camera approaches. The scene is dimly lit by a single overhead fixture with purple light filtering through a window on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a dim industrial corridor that culminates in the discovery of a vibrant, neon-lit vending machine. It begins in a narrow hallway defined by cold concrete walls and a metal security gate, with the environment cast in shadow and accented by purple light filtering through a side window. As the camera advances, the distant glow of a burrito vending machine becomes the central focal point, growing larger and more dominant within the frame. The scene finally shifts from the oppressive gloom of the industrial passage to the bright, saturated neon signage of the machine as the camera reaches its destination.
